name: Druid
description: A nature caster who balances healing and elemental damage. Druids mend with cure and burn foes with moonfire, then train regrowth and stoneskin to sustain and armor themselves, and at level 15 learn thornlash to bind and rend a foe in barbed vines, then at level 30 bear form, a shapeshift that swells them into a great bear for hard-hitting, thick-hided melee.
